app.title: Güntner Product Configurator
app.phase: Phase 3 — Vue/Nuxt frontend with GPC.EU API integration

perspective.switchHint: Switch perspective — same configuration, different lens

errors.proxyConfigMissing: API URL is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
errors.proxyAuthMissing: Authentication is missing. Please contact the administrator.
errors.proxyAuthFailed: Login to the GPC API failed. Please contact the administrator.
errors.proxyAuthRefreshFailed: Authentication token expired and refresh failed.
errors.proxyTimeout: The GPC API did not respond in time. Please try again.
errors.proxyUpstreamFail: The GPC API returned an error. Please try again.

presets.title: Parameter presets
presets.subtitle: Quick-start configurations for typical cooling use cases.

ui.appliedSuccessfully: Preset "{label}" applied — review settings in the form.
ui.appliedDryRun: Preview of "{label}" — no changes were made.
ui.noPresetsForCategory: No presets are available for the selected category.
ui.conflictWithCategory: This preset is designed for {expected}, but the current category is {actual}. Applying anyway may produce unexpected results.

cold-storage-fruit-vegetables.label: Cold storage — fruit & vegetables (+0 °C)
cold-storage-fruit-vegetables.description: Standard cooling chamber for fresh produce. High humidity (~90 %) to prevent dehydration. Air defrost preserves storage atmosphere.

cold-storage-fruit-with-streamer.label: Cold storage with Güntner Streamer
cold-storage-fruit-with-streamer.description: Same as fruit/vegetables cold storage but with extended air-throw via Güntner Streamer — improves humidity uniformity in large rooms.

cold-storage-meat-fish.label: Cold storage — meat & fish (−2 °C)
cold-storage-meat-fish.description: Chilled storage near 0 °C. Stainless steel finish for hygiene; minimal frost expected at this temperature range.

cold-storage-meat-hygienic.label: Hygienic meat & fish (stainless steel double tray)
cold-storage-meat-hygienic.description: Premium hygienic build: stainless steel double tray + Coil Defender for prolonged service in food-contact zones.

deep-freeze-storage.label: Deep freeze storage (−25 °C)
deep-freeze-storage.description: Long-term frozen storage. Hot-gas defrost reuses compressor waste heat (energy-efficient). EC fans for variable load.

deep-freeze-blast-nh3.label: Blast freezing −35 °C (NH₃ pump)
deep-freeze-blast-nh3.description: Fast freezing for industrial food processing. NH₃ pump-fed system with gravity-flooded option for highest efficiency at extreme cold.

deep-freeze-low-temp.label: Low evap. temp. design (t₀ < −40 °C)
deep-freeze-low-temp.description: Special design for ultra-low evaporation temperatures (cryogenic-adjacent). Heavy electric defrost for coil + tray.

beverages-dairy.label: Beverages & dairy (+2 °C)
beverages-dairy.description: Standard cooling for beverage warehouses and dairy storage. Low noise for indoor distribution centres.

pharma-laboratory.label: Pharma / laboratory (+5 °C)
pharma-laboratory.description: Pharmaceutical cold storage with validation requirements. Redundant cooling (two devices). Efficient EC fans, low-GWP R134a alternative.

industrial-nh3-pump.label: Industrial process — NH₃ pump
industrial-nh3-pump.description: Industrial process cooling with NH₃ pump-fed system. Often floor-mounted in machine rooms.

industrial-glycol-cooling.label: Industrial process — glycol coolant
industrial-glycol-cooling.description: Industrial process using a secondary glycol-water loop. Inlet/outlet temperature mode is the standard for coolant flows.

condenser-standard-outdoor.label: Condenser standard +35 °C outdoor
condenser-standard-outdoor.description: Standard heat rejection condenser for typical European summer design (T_amb = 35 °C, t_c = 45 °C).

condenser-high-ambient.label: Condenser high ambient (+45 °C)
condenser-high-ambient.description: For hot climates (Middle East, southern Spain summer peaks). Higher capacity to compensate; EC fans mandatory for stable operation.

condenser-multi-circuit.label: Condenser multi-circuit (parallel compressors)
condenser-multi-circuit.description: Two parallel refrigerant circuits — typical for rack systems with multiple compressors. Activates _2-suffix fields.

condenser-with-subcooler.label: Condenser with integrated subcooler
condenser-with-subcooler.description: Built-in subcooling stage (~3 K) downstream of condensation — improves expansion valve performance and overall COP.

subcooler-dedicated.label: Subcooler — dedicated unit
subcooler-dedicated.description: Standalone subcooler unit (category 5). Uses Inlet/Outlet temperature mode rather than dew point.

drycooler-glycol-outdoor.label: Dry cooler — glycol, outdoor
drycooler-glycol-outdoor.description: Outdoor glycol heat rejection. THREAD/FLANGE connections, corrosion protection for weather exposure.

oilcooler-industrial.label: Oil cooler — industrial
oilcooler-industrial.description: Cooling for compressor or hydraulic oil systems. Lower capacities, no humidity considerations.

co2-gas-cooler-transcritical.label: CO₂ gas cooler — transcritical
co2-gas-cooler-transcritical.description: Supercritical CO₂ heat rejection (T_amb ≥ 25 °C). HBLK valve, high-pressure 92 bar operation. Future-proof natural refrigerant.

co2-gas-cooler-subcritical.label: CO₂ gas cooler — subcritical mode
co2-gas-cooler-subcritical.description: CO₂ at low ambient temperatures where condensation occurs (below 31 °C critical point). Subcritical operation is more efficient when possible.

comfort-cooling.label: Comfort cooling (chiller +7 °C)
comfort-cooling.description: Building air conditioning via chilled-water loop. Low noise (<55 dB) for office use; glycol concentration only for freeze protection in winter mode.

datacenter-aircooled.label: Data center — air-cooled (sound-critical)
datacenter-aircooled.description: IT room cooling with strict noise budget. Glycol loop with high concentration for redundancy resilience.

datacenter-raised-floor.label: Data center — raised-floor CRAC-style
datacenter-raised-floor.description: Compact in-row coolers near server racks. Cool 12 °C return, 18 °C supply (modern hot/cold-aisle setup).

coastal-corrosion.label: Coastal / saline environment
coastal-corrosion.description: Increased corrosion protection for coastal sites (salt aerosol). Stainless legs, Coil Defender, corrosion class 4.

atex-zone-natural-refrigerant.label: ATEX zone — natural refrigerant only
atex-zone-natural-refrigerant.description: For installations in explosion-protected zones: only natural refrigerants (NH₃ or R290 propane). Restricted charge limits.

low-noise-indoor.label: Low-noise indoor (≤ 45 dB(A))
low-noise-indoor.description: Strict indoor noise limit (residential, hospital, school). EC fans + sound absorbers achieve <45 dB(A) at 3 m.

high-efficiency-aplus.label: High-efficiency A++ class
high-efficiency-aplus.description: Maximum energy efficiency. EC fans, efficiency-class filter A++ (excludes lower-class units from search).

transport-container-fit.label: Transport by container (≤ 11.8 m)
transport-container-fit.description: Unit dimensions constrained to standard 40-ft container (11.8 × 2.3 × 2.55 m). Sets transport rail flags.
